# Wojciech Łuszczyński — Apps & Builds

> Private workspace and portfolio of apps, agents, and revenue systems built by Wojciech Łuszczyński — growth operator, AI architect, builder.

## About

app.wojciech.io is Wojciech's personal app portfolio and workspace. It lists shipped products, tools, and experiments across GTM, AI systems, and consumer apps.

This site requires authentication for full access. The landing page and OG data are publicly visible.

## Links

- [wojciech.io](https://wojciech.io) — main site with case studies and positioning
- [subscribe.wojciech.io](https://subscribe.wojciech.io) — AI Espresso newsletter
- [academy.wojciech.io](https://academy.wojciech.io) — AI course
